robot_capabilities.delivery_bot1: Differential drive carry robot for indoor transport and cooperative item delivery.
robot_capabilities.delivery_bot2: Differential drive carry robot for indoor transport and cooperative item delivery.
robot_capabilities.delivery_bot3: Holonomic carry robot capable of omnidirectional movement for precise transport and cooperative delivery.
robot_capabilities.cleaning_bot: Holonomic carry robot capable of omnidirectional movement for precise transport and cooperative delivery.

robot_morphology.delivery_bot1: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 5 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.delivery_bot2: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 5 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.delivery_bot3: Drive Type: Holonomic, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional
robot_morphology.cleaning_bot: Drive Type: Holonomic, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional

task_specific_rules: This is a restaurant environment, where robots serve, clean and help.
The restaurant is fully autonomous and operated entirely by robots.
Stall 1 is for cake, gift, and speaker and stall 2 has all types of vegetarian food.
Tables 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6 are present in the restaurant environment.
There are 2 sinks in the environment.
Stalls, tables and sinks locations are fixed and known to all robots so no need to find them.
All customers are seated at tables. when you know customer locattion by table or chair nnumber, no need to find the customer.
Always assign tasks with the correct Stall Number or Table Number.
For a birthday special event, the gift, speaker, and cake are all in Stall 1.
To celebrate the birthday of a customer, delivery robots go as a team to pick and deliver the gift, speaker, and cake to the confirmed table of the customer.
Treat celebration as a coordinated independent team task.
Birthday is celebrated by only delivery robots. After celebrating, all delivery robots return home.
CRITICAL: Never send a STOP message to any of the robots.
Always use Independent tasks. For coordinated actions use team independent tasks. Do not use sequential or plan tasks.
